home.heroLogoAlt: Newon logo: outlined capital N with a white dot above
home.heroEyebrow: App studio · Team that turns ideas on
home.heroLead: From thought to reality—we design simple experiences built to last.
home.meaningP1Html: We turn new ideas on (On)—the moment thought connects to reality.
home.meaningP2: The moment a small idea moves into action, Newon begins.
home.aboutLead: Newon builds apps that solve everyday problems in a simple, intuitive way.
home.aboutP2: We reduce complexity so anyone can use our products—and ideas become real change.
home.brandP1Html: Newon doesn’t stop at features—we build experiences you keep using.
home.brandP2: We trim the unnecessary, focus on what matters, and put intuitive usability first.
home.workP1: Newon doesn’t stay in one product—we keep shipping new apps from many ideas.
home.workP2: Each service fits naturally into daily life and creates small, clear change.
home.productLi1: Tools that make everyday life easier
home.productLi2: Services that organize and improve personal life
home.visionP1Html: Not apps with endless features—apps you use for a long time.
home.visionP2: We aim to blend into daily life and help change stick.
home.subpingLead: Organize subscriptions and renewal reminders in one calm place.

ox.globalReachSummary: A habit journal built for a global audience—expanding to 41 countries over time, with nine languages available today.
ox.globalReachDescription: OX MONTH is designed for anyone who wants lightweight, honest daily check-ins. It currently supports nine languages—including Korean, English, Japanese, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), French, German, Hindi, and Indonesian—and we are gradually rolling out to 41 countries as listings and localization progress.
ox.subtitle: Log each day with O/X and see your month of change.
ox.storeReleaseLine: Available on the App Store & Google Play
ox.appStoreBadgeAria: OX MONTH on the App Store (opens in a new tab)
ox.googlePlayBadgeAria: OX MONTH on Google Play (opens in a new tab)
ox.introP1: an app to check daily follow-through simply—without heavy logging—and manage habits and goals for the month.
ox.introClosingHtml:
Small logs add up
into visible change.
ox.showcasePanelsAria: OX MONTH feature collage: widgets, reminders, habits, and daily check
ox.imgPanelsAlt: Four panels side by side: home widgets, notification settings, this month’s habits, and daily O/X check
ox.showcaseCarouselAria: OX MONTH app screenshots, nine images in a row. Scroll sideways to see them all.
ox.imgShowcase01Alt: OX MONTH key messages: simple habit check, O for success and X for miss, month at a glance, visible consistency
ox.imgShowcase02Alt: Phone: April monthly habit grid with green O and red X marks

ox.imgShowcase05Alt: Monthly statistics: O/X counts per habit, ratio, and best or weakest habit

ox.imgShowcase09Alt: Daily check: habit list with O and X buttons and save
ox.featCheckLead: Log the day with a simple O/X
ox.featCheckNote: Lightweight habit tracking without tedious input
ox.featMonthLead: See the flow of the month at a glance
ox.featStatsLead: See completion rates and patterns visually
ox.featNotifyLead: So you don’t miss a log
ox.featWidgetLead: Check in without opening the app
ox.featWidgetNote: Quick glance from the home screen
ox.stripTitle: One month of habits on one screen
ox.stripP: See every habit’s O/X on a date grid—consistency and gaps are easy to spot.
ox.imgGridAlt: Phone: monthly habit overview for April—O/X grid and Check in today button
ox.imgSocialAlt: Promo: Build Consistency That Lasts, five-star rating, and short testimonials
ox.imgFeatureLinesAlt: OX MONTH: simple habit tracking, Success = O / Fail = X, and centered O/X logo
ox.imgAiPanelAlt: AI coach: today’s quote, coach note, Check in today, and suggested habit order
ox.imgWidgetsPanelAlt: Home screen widgets: today’s habits list and yearly O/X bar in English
ox.dualShowcaseHeading: AI coach and home screen widgets
ox.how1P: Create a habit or start from a template—keep the list light and yours.
ox.how2P: Mark each day on the grid—your whole month and gaps are easy to see.
ox.how3P: Schedule nudges by time of day so you don’t miss a check-in.
ox.how4P: See O/X ratios, streaks, and which habits need a little care.
ox.how5P: Use AI coach and history to set your next goal and stay consistent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.bodyHtml:
This Privacy Policy describes how Newon (“we”, “us”) handles information when you use our website and mobile applications.

Information we collect

We may collect information you provide directly (such as email when you contact us) and limited technical data needed to operate the service (such as device or usage data), as described in each app’s settings and store listing.

How we use information

We use information to provide and improve our apps, respond to inquiries, and comply with law. We do not sell your personal information.

Data retention & security

We retain data only as long as needed for these purposes and use reasonable safeguards appropriate to the nature of the service.

Your rights

Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete certain data. Contact us at the email below to make a request.

Contact

Questions: newon@newon.app

This policy may be updated occasionally; the “Last updated” date will change when it does.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.bodyHtml:
These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your use of Newon’s website and applications. By using our services, you agree to these Terms.

Use of services

You agree to use our services lawfully and not to misuse, reverse engineer, or attempt to disrupt them.

Accounts and content

Some features may require an account. You are responsible for your account activity and any content you submit where applicable.

Changes and availability

We may modify or discontinue features to improve reliability or comply with requirements. We will provide notice when reasonable.

Disclaimer

Services are provided “as is” to the extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.

Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Newon is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the services.

Contact

newon@newon.app

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

sp.subtitle: See the money that leaves every month at a glance.
sp.heroReachSummary: A subscription and recurring-bill app for people everywhere. Available in 41 countries and 9 languages including Korean, English, and Japanese.
sp.showcaseCollageAria: SubPing app screenshots — seven screens. Scroll horizontally to view all.
sp.introHtml:
Every recurring bill in one place

SubPing helps you manage not only streaming-style subscriptions but also phone bills, insurance, rent, tuition, and every other recurring expense in one place.

It automatically organizes repeating charges and shows this month’s total and what’s due next—at a glance.

Spot inactive subscriptions and unnecessary spending easily, so saving money feels natural.

SubPing isn’t just a tracker—it’s built to change how money flows for you.
sp.imgTimelineAlt: Payment schedule, free trials, and subscription list
sp.feat1Title: 💳 All subscriptions & recurring bills in one place
sp.feat1Lead: Subscriptions, cards, and living costs—every recurring charge together
sp.feat2Lead: Totals your month from what you’ve entered—automatically
sp.feat3Lead: See what’s coming and get alerts so nothing slips
sp.feat4Lead: Separate active vs inactive and trim what you don’t need
sp.feat5Lead: Shows how much you could save—clearer, smarter spending
sp.feat6Lead: Health, streaming, bills—see category totals quickly
sp.feat7Lead: Payments and totals on your home screen without opening the app
sp.how1P: Add what you pay for regularly—streaming, phone, insurance, rent, and more.
sp.how2P: Charges roll into a clear monthly view with schedules in one place.
sp.how3P: Alerts before due dates so you never miss a payment.
sp.how4P: Check patterns and categories and cut what you don’t need.
sp.how5P: Cancel unused subs and run fixed costs more efficiently.
sp.prem1P: Richer monthly trends and how your spending shifts over time.
sp.prem2P: Savings ideas and pattern insights from your data.
sp.prem3P: Detects subscription price changes and notifies you.
sp.prem4P: Split and settle shared plans automatically.
sp.reco1: Juggle many subscriptions and need one hub
sp.reco2: Want to know where money goes each month
sp.reco3: Want to cut waste without spreadsheets
sp.reco4: Are building a money habit that lasts
sp.closingFoot: When spending is visible, your wallet changes.

ai.subtitle:
Manage money smarter
with AI
ai.heroReachSummary:
No more messy ledgers. Log spending—AIMONEY’s AI analyzes it and suggests ways to save.

Log income and spending, and AI reads patterns for savings and cash flow.
ai.showcaseScrollAria: Seven AIMONEY app screens. Scroll horizontally to see them all.
ai.imgShowcase01Alt: Intro: AIMONEY—smart ledger that analyzes spending and cash flow with AI
ai.imgShowcase02Alt: Calendar: income and expenses on dates in the monthly view
ai.imgShowcase03Alt: Assets: total balance and cards, cash, and accounts
ai.imgShowcase04Alt: Daily summary: expenses, income, and category donut chart
ai.imgShowcase05Alt: Home: income, expense, net summary and insight cards
ai.imgShowcase06Alt: AI: spending flow chart and category breakdown
ai.imgShowcase07Alt: Advanced analysis: categories and day-of-week patterns
ai.introHtml:
No more messy ledgers. Log once—AI picks up from there.

AIMONEY isn’t just a log—it understands your spending habits and helps you choose better: an AI-powered smart money app.

The moment you record income and spending, AI reads the data and suggests spending patterns, saving strategies, and even future cash flow.

AIMONEY isn’t a plain ledger—it’s built to change how money flows for you.
ai.feat1Lead: Organize all income and expenses with simple entry. An intuitive UI anyone can use.
ai.feat2Lead: Auto-categorize spending and see patterns at a glance with clear charts.
ai.feat3Lead: AI spots overspending and suggests concrete ways to save.
ai.feat4Lead: Summarize the month and see clearly where your money went.
ai.feat5Lead: Log frequent expenses in one tap with shortcuts.
ai.feat6Lead: Set budgets, track usage in real time, and see progress toward goals.
ai.feat7Lead: Accounts, cash, and investments—see finances in one place.
ai.feat8Lead: Check balances and spending without opening the app.
ai.feat9Lead: Turn reports and wealth changes into clean images you can share.
ai.premiumTagline:
Stronger AI and deeper analysis—
a whole new level of money management.
ai.prem1P: Beyond basics—changes in habits, causes of overspend, and how to improve.
ai.prem2P: Concrete amounts and actions based on your own spending data.
ai.prem3P: Deeper daily, weekly, monthly, and category breakdowns.
ai.prem4P: Track how wealth changes over time and forecast what’s ahead.
ai.prem5P: Predict upcoming spending so you can plan early.
ai.prem6P: Unusual patterns, budget overruns, and spending spikes—in real time.
ai.prem7P: More layouts and widgets to make the app yours.
ai.prem8P: Share AI results and reports with refined designs.
ai.why2: A smart system that learns your spending patterns
ai.why3: Intuitive UX anyone can pick up
ai.why5: See cash flow in real time
ai.reco1: You spend money but aren’t sure where it went
ai.reco2: You want to start structured money management
ai.reco3: You want to improve spending habits
ai.reco4: You’re looking for an AI-powered smart ledger
ai.reco5: You want goals and savings driven by data
ai.closingHiLine: Start smarter spending and wealth management with AIMONEY today.
